title: Goal story update
description: A progress update on a goal story within the big-picture coordination loop. Goal story updates are the recurring signal that keeps plans connected to progress - written narratives that give everyone the context they need.

actor_id.description: ID of the actor who provided this update.

goal_story_id.description: ID of the goal story this update is for.

status.description: Goal story status as of this update.

title.description: A short headline for this update - the essential takeaway in one line.

content.description: Narrative update - the written context about where things stand and why. Writing it down clarifies thinking, makes updates digestible, and creates a searchable record.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this update was published (ISO 8601).
